final_text: {"file":"django/forms/fields.py","class":"FileField","method":"clean","parent_class":"Field","fix_summary":"The `clean()` method handles all three states — raising `FILE_INPUT_CONTRADICTION` when the widget returns a contradictory input, returning `False` (clear) when the user ticked the clear checkbox, falling back to `initial` when no new file was submitted, and otherwise delegating to `super().clean()` (which calls `to_python()`) when a new file is present."}

parsed_answer.fix_summary: The `clean()` method handles all three states — raising `FILE_INPUT_CONTRADICTION` when the widget returns a contradictory input, returning `False` (clear) when the user ticked the clear checkbox, falling back to `initial` when no new file was submitted, and otherwise delegating to `super().clean()` (which calls `to_python()`) when a new file is present.
